title: tanacetum cilicium
intro: Tanacetum cilicium, also known as White Tansy, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the eastern Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds that can be used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Tanacetum cilicium include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy for overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum cilicium can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
